summary:
MRI identifies structural markers linked to discogenic pain but cannot replicate the biomechanical loading or provoke actual pain responses seen during provocative discography. Consequently, it lacks the ability to accurately predict concordial pain provocation during injections.  
\boxed{\text{No}}

Consequently, it lacks the ability to accurately predict concordial pain provocation during injections.  
\boxed{\text{No}}. Answer choice: A
